title: Amped-Up Armory
description: A rework of weapon and tool textures/models!
body:
![All the newly added axes in a circle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba70b5fd7bb8a706a08b9ce1cfa7605bcfd87ae7.png)


## DISCLAIMER (12/30/25)
### it's been a while since the last update on the pack, sorry!!! as of now the plan is to finish all vanilla tools in their entirety and release it once thats done, so it'll take a while longer but ill try and be quick!


Amped-Up Armory is a resource pack that focuses on **improving weapons and tools!** Through making bigger models and textures, weapons and tools can feel more powerful and heavy while keeping a vanilla look!

This is achieved by making larger in-hand models for tools and weapons (24x), while leaving the UI textures at the same resolution (16x) to make them feel natural and part of the game!

You can also find me on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/snuckyy.bsky.social)! 
⠀
## Includes
- All Sword Retextures
- All Axe Retextures
- Sword UI Textures
- Axe UI Textures

⠀

## Planned
- All Tools & Weapons
- All Tool & Weapon UI Textures
- Name-Based Variants (Diamond/Netherite)
  - Weapons/Tools From Media
  - Other Types Of Weapons/Tools
  - Unique Weapons/Tools
# ⠀
